docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $233.07 FILED BY DAVIS, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT WEST, ALAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-19-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT WEST, ALAN NO APPEARANCE BY PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WILL DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
DEFAULT REQUEST/JUDGMENT RECEIVED SUBMITTED BY: PRO PER
